creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Vanilla, can you OK the following ports removal please?

archivers/erlang-snappy
converters/erlang-base64url
devel/elixir-bson
devel/elixir-coverex
devel/elixir-excoveralls
net/elixir-kafka_ex
net/elixir-oauth2
security/elixir-jose
security/erlang-jose
www/elixir-joken

Jimmy, seeing as this is a large change can you OK too?

thanks!
